subject: english
title: Unit 8 Reader App — The Bug Girl
subtitle: Vocab Foundations + Read Along + Comprehension + Ask Questions + Final Quiz. 6 modules.

content: Read a biography about Sophia Spencer and her love of insects.
Use the Ask Questions strategy with a Question/Answer chart.
Sequence key events and retell the story.
Answer comprehension questions about the text.
language: Use vocabulary words enjoy, collect, bug, fossil, alone, and dinosaur.
Use glossary words like paleontologist, primate, preserved, and exhibits.
Ask and answer questions about a biography.
